/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libdelta_robot_serial__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libdelta_robot_serial__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/delta_robot_serial__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/delta_robot_serial/srv/detail/ikin__description.c.o CMakeFiles/delta_robot_serial__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/delta_robot_serial/srv/detail/ikin__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/delta_robot_serial__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/delta_robot_serial/srv/detail/ikin__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/delta_robot_serial__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/delta_robot_serial/action/detail/pos_traj__description.c.o CMakeFiles/delta_robot_serial__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/delta_robot_serial/action/detail/pos_traj__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/delta_robot_serial__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/delta_robot_serial/action/detail/pos_traj__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libaction_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libunique_identifier_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
